response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with strong craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and exposure to high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — all central to this Principal-level role. Title history is mostly Senior/Staff rather than Principal/IC6, and there's limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership or systemic influence at the scale this role demands.
strengths: 13+ years across full-stack, embedded, and high-throughput microservices (millions of req/s at Sociomantic)
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development, and active mentoring/teaching
Polyglot across required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C/C++, Java, C#) plus DLang and Python-adjacent stacks
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure
Lacks evidence of telemetry/metrics platforms, statistical analysis, or data-science partnership at scale
Career level (Senior/Staff) and scope of influence don't clearly match Principal/IC6 multi-workstream leadership expectations

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
